name: logitrack-my
description: Logistics SaaS platform for Malaysia — orders, shipments, warehousing, cross-border

scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/db && npx prisma@5.14.0 migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd packages/db && npx prisma db seed
scripts.dev:web: cd apps/web && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.db:push: cd packages/db && npx prisma@5.14.0 db push
